metadata.title: Pricing | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Spreadsheet-aligned Adon ERP package pricing in BDT with optional USD conversion.

hero.label: Adon ERP Pricing

hero.description: BDT is the primary pricing currency. Start with the package that fits your team, then switch to USD anytime for an approximate converted view.
highlights: Source pricing follows the current package sheet

cards.workflowDescription: Each card shows setup cost, recurring charge, and package coverage without hidden pricing logic.

plansSection.title: Spreadsheet-aligned pricing for core packages and enterprise service.

currency.note: USD prices are approximate and use 1 USD = {rate} BDT.

benefitsSection.title: Pricing that stays readable for teams and enterprise buyers.
benefitsSection.description: Adon ERP pricing is shown as source-based package data so setup, recurring fees, user coverage, and included modules remain easy to review.

benefits.title: Source-based pricing
benefits.description: Package values follow the current spreadsheet structure instead of abstract marketing tiers.

benefits.title: Clear charge breakdown
benefits.description: Setup, recurring, and enterprise maintenance costs are shown separately for easier planning.

benefits.title: Operational fit
benefits.description: Choose a package by user count and included modules without guessing what is bundled.

comparisonSection.title: Compare every package clearly.
comparisonSection.description: Review user limits, setup charges, recurring fees, and included modules from the source pricing sheet before choosing.

faqs.q: Is BDT the default pricing currency?
faqs.a: Yes. The source package sheet is maintained in BDT, so the pricing page defaults to BDT.

faqs.q: Can I view the same prices in USD?
faqs.a: Yes. The USD toggle gives an approximate converted view using the configured exchange rate shown on the page.

faqs.q: Why do some packages show every 3 months while enterprise shows monthly?
faqs.a: That follows the structure in the source sheet. Core packages use quarterly recurring charges, while the enterprise reporting service includes monthly charges and monthly server maintenance.

faqs.q: What does the starting total represent?
faqs.a: For the core packages, the starting total combines the one-time setup charge with the first recurring billing cycle shown in the sheet.

faqs.q: Can users or modules be customized later?
faqs.a: Yes. Contact the sales team if you need a package recommendation, custom rollout scope, or enterprise reporting support.

ctaSection.title: Ready to review the right package with your team?
ctaSection.description: Start from the package that matches your users and modules, then confirm the rollout scope with Adon ERP sales.
